article.title: 7 Free SEO Tools for Small Business That Actually Work in 2026
article.body_markdown:
You do not need a $100/month SEO software stack. Here are 7 free tools that work:

1. **Google Search Console** - Free keyword data
2. **Google Keyword Planner** - Free keyword research
3. **AnswerThePublic** - Free search intent discovery
4. **Yoast SEO** - Free WordPress optimization
5. **PageSpeed Insights** - Free site speed testing
6. **SEO Spark Free SEO Checker** - Free website SEO audit at seospark.net/free-seo-checker
7. **SEO Spark AI Blog Writer** - Free blog writing with built-in SEO

The first 5 are Google tools. The last 2 are tools I built to fill the gap between research and publishing.

Try the [free SEO checker](https://seospark.net/free-seo-checker) or [free AI blog writer](https://seospark.net) - 3 articles, no credit card.
